round1_findings_status.F1_http_false_green: fixed — invokes CreateFileContentAsync, asserts IOException out-of-root, byte round-trip in-root
round1_findings_status.F2_fluid_false_green: fixed — drives Fluid.Render with {% include %}, asserts content in/out behaviour; bonus PlangFileInfo byte[]→string bug fixed
round1_findings_status.F3_openai_false_green: fixed — invokes ResolveImage, asserts wire payload contains/lacks PNG-base64 magic 'iVBOR'
round1_findings_status.F4_debug_false_green: fixed — drives ResolveLlmFilePath + EmitLlmBlock; asserts return is path.@this (type-channel invariant); content round-trip
round1_findings_status.F5_apploaad_no_assert: fixed — Id/Name unchanged + subsequent Save succeeds
round1_findings_status.F6_weak_success_false: superseded by F1-F4 fixes (content-based assertions are stronger than Error.Key checks)
round1_findings_status.F7_discover_dotdot: fixed — both branches assert; denial branch checks Error != null and Error.Key != NullReferenceException (loose but not vacuous)
round1_findings_status.F8_plang_denial_goals: accepted — documentation-quality gap, not behaviour gap

process_violations.impact: Tester cannot mechanically diff regressions on a noisier branch; not blocking here.
process_violations.suggestion: Coder writes baseline-tests.md at the start of each iteration.

summary: Round 2 PASS. All 4 major handler-layer false greens, the zero-assertion AppLoad test, and the vacuous Discover dotdot test are genuinely fixed. Suite stays green (C# 3025/3025, PLang 206/206, zero PLNG002). Coverage on previously-cold handler files jumped: Fluid 42.6→73.4%, Debug 35.2→50.9%. Coder also discovered + fixed an unrelated PlangFileInfo byte[]→string bug while hardening Fluid tests — a positive externality of the test-quality push. Production migration is sound and the test layer now honestly verifies it.
